title: Harll
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Bounty hunter |image=[[File:Harll.jpg]] |name=Harll |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''{{TCW|Heroes on Both Sides}} [[The Rig]]''[[Star Wars: Republic: Show of Force]]'' |species=[[Farghul]]''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] |feathers= |eyes=Yellow |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Crimson Nova]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|All my life I have trained to kill! The death of Jedi will make me great!''"
"''A sad waste of life.|Harll and [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|}} '''Harll''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Farghul]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and a member of the [[Crimson Nova]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|We are equal in weapons! So all that remains is—whose will for death is greater!|Harll, to Mace Windu|[[Republic 66|''Republic'' 66]]}} [[File:TheDeathofHarll.jpg|thumb|left|Mace Windu kills Harll.]] Harll was a fierce warrior who often preferred to fight rather than think. Because of his warrior nature, he managed to obtain a [[Sword/Legends|sword]] with a [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]] alloy blade as a gift from a [[Morgukai]] warrior. Eventually, he became romantically associated with the [[Farghul]], [[Mika (Farghul)|Mika]], and joined her [[Crimson Nova|chapter]] of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]]. This chapter stood out from others for their willingness to accept a contracts on [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] bounties; this eventually attracted the attention of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] who [[Mission to the Rig|sent]] four [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] to deal with the Chapter. When these Masters arrived, Harll used his cortosis sword to fight [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] in a duel that would ultimately lead to Harll's [[Death/Legends|death]]. The Jedi soon overtook the bounty hunter's [[The Rig|headquarters]] and forced the contract to be canceled. ==Behind the scenes== When Harll's name is first spoken in ''Show of Force'', it is misspelled "Harrll". ==Appearances== *[[Republic 65|''Republic'' 65]] *[[Republic 66|''Republic'' 66]] {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{ID|Harrll}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Harll}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Harll }} [[Category:Bounty hunters]] [[Category:Farghul]] [[Category:Males]]
